hint: A word that explains why something happened
sentence: I wore a jacket ___ it was cold.

hint: A word meaning very pretty
sentence: The sunset over Port Phillip Bay was ___.

hint: Someone you like spending time with
sentence: My best ___ came to my birthday party.

hint: When people do something as a group
sentence: We worked ___ to build the sandcastle.

hint: Not the same as something else
sentence: Each tram route is ___ from the others.

hint: Something that matters a lot
sentence: It is ___ to look both ways before crossing.

hint: As much as you need
sentence: Do we have ___ milk for breakfast?

hint: More than one person
sentence: Many ___ visit the MCG each year.

hint: Past tense of think
sentence: I ___ the movie was really exciting.

hint: Going from one side to the other
sentence: We walked ___ the Royal Botanic Gardens.

hint: What you say when someone asks a question
sentence: Please write your ___ on the line.

hint: Something you ask to find out information
sentence: Raise your hand if you have a ___.

hint: The one you like best (Australian spelling)
sentence: Blue is my ___ colour.

hint: Red, blue and green are all this (Australian spelling)
sentence: What ___ is your school jumper?

hint: A place where you go to learn
sentence: I ride my bike to ___ each morning.

hint: The person who helps you learn
sentence: Our ___ read us a great story.

hint: A place full of books to borrow
sentence: We borrowed three books from the ___.

hint: The early part of the day
sentence: We eat breakfast every ___.

hint: The part of the day after lunch
sentence: We have sport in the ___.

hint: Is it sunny, rainy or windy?
sentence: The ___ in Melbourne changes quickly.

hint: A living creature like a dog or koala
sentence: My favourite ___ is the wombat.

hint: A huge grey animal with a trunk
sentence: We saw an ___ at the zoo.

hint: An Australian animal that hops
sentence: A ___ bounced across the field.

hint: An insect with pretty wings
sentence: A ___ landed on the flower.

hint: A place where plants grow
sentence: We planted carrots in the ___.

hint: Your parents, siblings and relatives
sentence: My whole ___ went to the beach.

hint: The day you celebrate being born
sentence: I had a party for my ___.

hint: Time off from school or work
sentence: We travelled to Sydney for the ___.

hint: The first meal of the day
sentence: I had toast for ___.

hint: The room where food is cooked
sentence: Mum is cooking dinner in the ___.

hint: You look through this in a wall
sentence: A bird tapped on the ___.

hint: A very tall, rocky hill
sentence: Snow covered the top of the ___.

hint: Water that flows, like the Yarra
sentence: We rowed a boat down the ___.

hint: A huge body of salty water
sentence: Whales live deep in the ___.

hint: A vehicle with two wheels and pedals
sentence: I rode my ___ around the park.

hint: More than one child
sentence: The ___ played happily in the yard.

hint: Doing something in a lovely way
sentence: She sang ___ at the concert.

hint: Doing something with speed
sentence: The dog ran ___ after the ball.

hint: Doing something with care
sentence: He carried the glass ___.

hint: Happening all at once
sentence: ___, the lights went out.

hint: The feeling of being very happy
sentence: Her smile was full of ___.

hint: All the things you know
sentence: Reading gives you lots of ___.

hint: To keep something in your mind
sentence: I ___ my first day of school.

hint: The best-liked thing
sentence: Pizza is my ___ dinner.

hint: The day before today
sentence: It rained all day ___.

hint: The day after today
sentence: We are going swimming ___.

hint: Every single person
sentence: ___ clapped at the end of the play.

hint: A thing you cannot name exactly
sentence: I heard ___ in the bushes.

hint: Lovely to look at
sentence: The Twelve Apostles look ___ at sunset.

hint: Something that does work, like a washing one
sentence: Dad fixed the washing ___.

hint: A sweet brown treat
sentence: I love ___ ice cream.

hint: A healthy food like a carrot or pea
sentence: Broccoli is my favourite ___.

hint: Not safe
sentence: It is ___ to run near the pool.

hint: Full of fun and thrills
sentence: The rollercoaster was very ___.

hint: Something that holds your attention
sentence: We read an ___ book about space.

hint: A tool you use to cut paper
sentence: Please pass me the ___.

hint: Shows the days and months
sentence: I marked my birthday on the ___.

hint: Something you really need
sentence: A helmet is ___ when riding a bike.

hint: A kind act for someone (Australian spelling)
sentence: Could you do me a ___?

hint: Someone who lives nearby (Australian spelling)
sentence: Our ___ waters our plants when we are away.
